products.title: Products

food.title: Food Product
food.subtitle:
Ready-to-use seasoning powder products under the Svariest brand, 
developed for convenience, consistent flavor, and the needs of modern consumers.

items.title: Ready-to-Cook Spice Blend
items.body: A ready-to-cook seasoning powder made from more than 12 authentic Thai herbs and spices, bringing together traditional Thai flavors in one convenient sachet. Richly aromatic and perfectly balanced, it can be used in a variety of Thai and fusion dishes. Suitable for grilling, marinating, stir-frying, or seasoning, it helps elevate dishes with a distinctive Thai taste effortlessly.

items.title: Ready-to-Eat Mala Spice
items.body: A ready-to-eat mala seasoning powder that combines the bold spiciness of mala with the aromatic essence of Thai herbs. The flavor is intense yet well-balanced in a way familiar to Thai consumers. Perfect for grilling, marinating, stir-frying, or dipping sauces, it adds a unique layer of Thai-inspired flavor to a wide range of dishes.

items.title: Ready-to-Cook Laab Spice
items.body: A ready-to-cook laab seasoning powder based on the original Northern Thai recipe. Infused with Thai spices and local herbs, it delivers the authentic spicy, aromatic, and well-rounded flavor of traditional laab. Convenient for making laab, spicy salads, nam tok, or even dipping sauces without the need to prepare multiple ingredients.

itemBlock.title: Item
lines: Packaging Size: 1 pouch or 24 pouches per carton
Packaging: 300 gsm art paper + aluminum zip-lock pouch

postHarvest.title: Agri Food (Postharvest)
postHarvest.subtitle:
Post-harvest flower preservation products under the KLORA brand,
developed to extend the shelf life and freshness of cut flowers.
postHarvest.body: An innovative solution for flower care and restoration that helps maintain freshness and quality for more than 14 days. It reduces microbial buildup in water and prevents blockage in the flower stem’s vascular system, allowing flowers to absorb water and nutrients more efficiently. As a result, flowers remain fresh, vibrant in color, and well-shaped for a longer period. Suitable for various flower types, including orchids, roses, gerberas, carnations, chrysanthemums, and many others.
postHarvest.size: Net weight: 60 g (12 sachets per box)

itemBlock.title: Item
lines: Packaging: 300 gsm art paper + aluminum pouch

agro.title: Agri Food (Pre harvest)
agro.subtitle:
Biological supplement products based on endophytic fungi under the BiMega brand,
developed to enhance nutrient absorption and stimulate plant growth.
agro.body: A biological innovation designed to unlock nutrients in the soil and stimulate root development from within the plant through the activity of endophytic fungi and natural IAA hormones. It enhances nutrient absorption efficiency, strengthens root systems, and supports sustainable crop productivity.
